name: WAR
description: $WAR is a community-driven memecoin on Solana capturing the zeitgeist of modern geopolitical discourse with humor and cultural relevance. Born from the viral narrative surrounding strategic global resources and bold political moves, $WAR represents the first timeless political meme token positioned at the intersection of current events and crypto culture. Fair-launched on bonk.fun with zero insider allocations, $WAR embodies true decentralization and community ownership. The token features a USD1 trading pair, bridging meme culture with stablecoin accessibility. With a passionate holder base building organically, $WAR isn't just a token—it's a movement rallying degens who understand that in crypto, timing is everything. The war for attention has begun.
